channel.title: Eli's Bookmark Briefing
channel.description: Daily full-text readings of Jacob's bookmarked articles, curated by Eli.
channel.itunes:author: Eli
channel.itunes:summary: Daily full-text readings of Jacob's bookmarked articles.

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — April 5, 2026
item.description: 5 articles: F-15E shootdown analysis, SERE training, OpenAI acquires TBPN, Karpathy's LLM knowledge bases, AI coding agent best practices
item.itunes:summary: 5 articles: F-15E shootdown analysis, SERE training, OpenAI acquires TBPN, Karpathy's LLM knowledge bases, AI coding agent best practices

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — April 4, 2026
item.description: 7 articles: Niantic's data pivot, Wright Thompson on writing, AI emotions, space toilets, subscription economics, incumbents vs startups, solo founder life
item.itunes:summary: 7 articles: Niantic's data pivot, Wright Thompson on writing, AI emotions, space toilets, subscription economics, incumbents vs startups, solo founder life

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — April 3rd, 2026
item.description: 10 articles: OpenClaw best practices, quality vs speed in AI, humanizing technology, hybrid monetization, agent-friendly pricing pages, SaaS survival, Knuth-Plass typography, userland text measurement, Basecamp MCP
item.itunes:summary: 10 articles: OpenClaw best practices, quality vs speed in AI, humanizing technology, hybrid monetization, agent-friendly pricing pages, SaaS survival, Knuth-Plass typography, userland text measurement, Basecamp MCP

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — April 2nd, 2026
item.description: Six pieces on AI and work: Service as software, AI writing workflow, vibe coding satire, European founder parody, Gumroad's AI CEO, and parallelization over superintelligence
item.itunes:summary: Six pieces on AI and work: Service as software, AI writing workflow, vibe coding satire, European founder parody, Gumroad's AI CEO, and parallelization over superintelligence

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — April 1, 2026
item.description: 9 articles: trial length psychology (RevenueCat), autonomous agents vs copilots (Decagon), Block's intelligence-over-hierarchy org design, robotics + LLMs (Physical Intelligence), vibe-coding limits, and AI's impact on age, work, and velocity
item.itunes:summary: 9 articles: trial length psychology (RevenueCat), autonomous agents vs copilots (Decagon), Block's intelligence-over-hierarchy org design, robotics + LLMs (Physical Intelligence), vibe-coding limits, and AI's impact on age, work, and velocity

item.description: 7 articles: Knuth-Plass text layout, mobile app monetization case study, Pretext userland text measurement, Marc Andreessen origin story, startup mortality trends, DoorDash hiring philosophy, Notion's Think Together

item.description: 10 articles: Claude Code skills architecture, Jason Lemkin on B2B AI strategy, GitLab CEO Sid's cancer journey, hustle vs. slowing down, Forrest Gump's Apple investment, AI pricing power, DoorDash's city catalog vision

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — March 26, 2026
item.description: 12 articles: Joy in software, hardware revolution, Life Reset's 95% drop, Code.Storage scaling to 15K repos/min, Sierra's Ghostwriter, Basecamp CLI, Garry Tan on tokens, AI layoff categories, Jamie Dimon on competition, Mitchell Green's work ethic, subscription refunds, Guillermo Rauch staying terminally online

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — March 24, 2026
